name: @redeploy/studio
description: Visual tool: drag-and-drop authoring of contract connections and configuration (emits spec files) plus a deployment inspector. React + React Flow.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @redeploy/core build && pnpm --filter @redeploy/config build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @redeploy/core build && pnpm --filter @redeploy/config build && vitest run
scripts.coverage: pnpm --filter @redeploy/core build && pnpm --filter @redeploy/config build && vitest run --coverage
